title: Portuguese Shrimp Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Portugal, rich in seafood and spices.

ingredients.name: Portuguese Stew Fish (such as Cod or Haddock)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and diced red pepper, and sauté until the vegetables are soft.
Add the chopped tomato and sauté for another 2 minutes.
Add the fish sauce, white wine, and stir to combine.
Add the Portuguese stew fish and shrimp, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with parsley if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over rice, if desired.
